---
title: Publications
listing:
  - id: conference-pubs
    contents: publications/conference/*.qmd
    sort: "date desc"
    type: custom
    template: _pub-listing.ejs
    fields: [title, author, date, venue]
  - id: journal-pubs
    contents: publications/journal/*.qmd
    sort: "date desc"
    type: custom
    template: _pub-listing.ejs
    fields: [title, author, date, venue]
  - id: workshop-pubs
    contents: publications/workshop/*.qmd
    sort: "date desc"
    type: custom
    template: _pub-listing.ejs
    fields: [title, author, date, venue]
  - id: manuscript-pubs
    contents: publications/manuscript/*.qmd
    sort: "date desc"
    type: custom
    template: _pub-listing.ejs
    fields: [title, author, date, venue]
---

## Conference Papers

:::{#conference-pubs}
:::

## Journal Articles

:::{#journal-pubs}
:::

## Workshop Papers

:::{#workshop-pubs}
:::

## Manuscripts

:::{#manuscript-pubs}
:::
